info.title: MSBuild Project Organizer
info.description: A tool for organizing csproj files. Groups and sorts ItemGroups based on item type and file extension.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Sorts and organizes messy csproj files

options.name: scan
options.description: Scan for a .sln file in the current directory, and organize all associated .csproj files. Other arguments have no effect when using scan [default: False]

options.name: input
options.description: The csproj file that should be sorted

options.name: output
options.description: The output file path, if the result should be saved to a new file

options.name: config
options.description: The path to a configuration file

options.name: sln
options.description: The path to a specific solution file. This is only necessary if you have multiple .sln files in the current directory.
